title: lotus siliquosus var. maritimus
intro: Lotus siliquosus var. maritimus, also known as the sea lotus or sea bean, is a variety of the lotus siliquosus plant that grows in coastal areas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of lotus siliquosus var. maritimus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, among others. Lotus siliquosus var. maritimus is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as capsules or tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
